message:
Add end-to-end HTTP protocol and packfile roundtrip tests

- Packfile build + unpack roundtrip (4 objects survive serialization)
- HTTP receive-pack: push with packfile, verify refs updated in KV
- HTTP receive-pack: non-fast-forward rejection
- HTTP upload-pack: clone with want/have, verify PACK in sideband response
- HTTP upload-pack: error on empty wants
- Full push → info-refs → clone cycle: objects survive entire HTTP roundtrip
- Worktree materialization triggered by receive-pack push
- libgit2 WASM export presence and initialization
- 44 tests total, all passing in Workers runtime via wrangler
